creator: riggs@FreeBSD.org
text:
Committed with two modifications:
- Pet portlint (Makefile sections)
- No change of maintainer yet


@Franco: Your point regarding maintainership is valid, but since Alexander (melifaro) is a committer with a recent commit history, I'd prefer to give him the chance to respond to the request to transfer maintainership.
Could create a new bug report that contains only the patch for maintainership change? In the details of the patch request for approval from Alexander. Feel free to assign the bug directly to me. If we don't get a response within four weeks, we will transfer maintainership to you.

I hope this is an acceptable proposal.
